assertions.description: The design is a USB-to-RS232 adapter: USB-C -> CH340N (USB-UART IC) -> unnamed nets __unnamed_5/6 -> MAX232 (UART-RS232 IC) -> DE-9 socket. The ic_pin_analysis correctly identifies U1 (CH340N) as 'USB interface' and U2 (MAX232) as 'UART interface', and the pin connections are traced correctly (CH340N TXD pin 6 on __unnamed_5 connects to MAX232 T1IN pin 11). However, design_analysis.bus_analysis.uart is empty because the UART net names are anonymous (__unnamed_5, __unnamed_6), not labeled TX/RX.
